title: taraxacum lamprophyllum
intro: Taraxacum lamprophyllum, also known as the large-leaved dandelion or golden dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum lamprophyllum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Taraxacum lamprophyllum is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
